overview_summary: The sole neighboring landowners profiled have not publicly expressed a stance on development. Darrel D. and Lee Ann Howell show no evident involvement in local civic affairs. Overall influence appears low, with no high-influence neighbors in this group.

neighbors.name: Darrel D. Howell & Lee Ann Howell
neighbors.claims: Darrel D. Howell (age 57) and Lee Ann Howell are listed as co-owners of a parcel in Cochise County ([www.menstoppingviolence.org](https://www.menstoppingviolence.org/people/darrel-howell/#:~:text=match%20at%20L410%202561%20Calle,Huachuca%20City%2C%20AZ%2C%2085616%20Current)). Available public records show Darrel Howell has lived in the Cochise area (previously in Cochise, AZ, now in Huachuca City) ([www.menstoppingviolence.org](https://www.menstoppingviolence.org/people/darrel-howell/#:~:text=2561%20Calle%20Noveno%2C%20Huachuca%20City%2C,AZ%2C%2085616%20Current)). No public statements or media reports were found in which either Howell voiced an opinion on local development projects ([saddlebagnotes.com](https://saddlebagnotes.com/news/local/article_3030c105-5b22-5ceb-83af-8ea985fd6dc0.html#:~:text=The%20conflict%20erupted%20recently%20at,trying%20to%20protect%20the%20aquifer)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Maintain a neighborly, informative approach. Reach out personally to share project details and invite their questions, focusing on open communication since they have not taken any public position.
